Magic Plate Armor

Magic Plate Armor
Attributes
NameMagic Plate Armor
ClassificationBody Equipment
SlotBody
TypeArmor
Arm17
Weight80.00 oz
Imbuement Slots2
Level RequirementNone
VocationKnights, Paladins
Dropped ByDemon, Dragon Lord, Ferumbras, Orshabaal
Value90,000 gp
MarketableYes
Buy FromGnomission (Warzone 1) 90,000 gp
Sell ToRashid 40,000 gp

The Magic Plate Armor is one of the best armors in Tibia. It provides an armor value of 17 and is highly sought after by knights and paladins.
